creator: kiri@kiri.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've made NEW port about making virtual fonts for dvi2ps.
	I put the port packed with 'tar czf' on to

	ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/port-jp-vftool-1.2.tar.gz

	Packed list is

	       1944 Mar 12 23:20 port-jp-vftool-1.2-970312.tar.gz

		  0 Mar 12 23:19 1997 virfonts/
		077 Mar 12 23:18 1997 virfonts/Makefile
		  0 Mar 11 22:27 1997 virfonts/patches/
		965 Mar 11 22:27 1997 virfonts/patches/patch-aa
		  0 Mar 12 19:07 1997 virfonts/pkg/
		946 Mar 12 18:48 1997 virfonts/pkg/PLIST
		 50 Mar 11 20:03 1997 virfonts/pkg/COMMENT
		812 Mar 11 21:03 1997 virfonts/pkg/DESCR
		  0 Mar 11 20:28 1997 virfonts/files/
		119 Mar 11 20:28 1997 virfonts/files/md5
